brand.name: Dean on Deck
brand.tagline: No kids. No stress. Just you.

seo.title: Dean on Deck — Virgin Voyages First Mate | Adults-Only Luxury Cruises
seo.description: I'm Dean, your Gold-Certified Virgin Voyages First Mate. Adults-only sailings, Michelin-inspired dining, RockStar perks, and zero booking fees. No kids. No stress. Just you.
seo.ogTitle: Dean on Deck — Sail like a grown-up
seo.ogDescription: Adults-only Virgin Voyages cruises, planned end to end by a Gold-Certified First Mate. No kids. No stress. Just you.

cruiseLines.name: Virgin Voyages
cruiseLines.alt: A Virgin Voyages ship at sea, its scarlet-red funnel catching the light
cruiseLines.d: This is the line I know bow to stern. Adults-only ships, 20+ eateries included, and nights that end at a pool party instead of a kids' club. As a Gold-certified First Mate I book it daily — my link costs you nothing extra and I stack every perk you're owed.
points: MNVV discounts + Sailor Loot when you book with me

cruiseLines.name: Royal Caribbean
cruiseLines.alt: A white-sand Caribbean beach with turquoise water
cruiseLines.d: The biggest ships at sea and the easy answer for multi-generational trips — surf simulators, water slides, Broadway-scale shows, and Perfect Day at CocoCay. When grandparents, parents, and kids all sail together, this is the line I reach for.

cruiseLines.name: Celebrity Cruises
cruiseLines.alt: White-washed houses stacked above the blue Aegean in Greece
cruiseLines.d: Resort-style ships with real design pedigree, elevated dining, and curated itineraries across the globe — the Greek Isles are a signature. For travelers who want polish and quiet luxury without the formality.

cruiseLines.name: Silversea
cruiseLines.alt: Limestone karsts rising from still emerald water at dawn
cruiseLines.d: Intimate, all-inclusive ships where a butler comes with every suite and the fare covers nearly everything — plus expedition routes that reach Antarctica, the Galápagos, and the ends of the earth.

cruiseLines.name: River Boat Cruises
cruiseLines.alt: Dean on a canal boat gliding past the gabled houses of Amsterdam
cruiseLines.d: Small vessels that dock in the heart of town — the Danube, the Rhine, the Douro, the Mekong. I work across the leading river lines (AmaWaterways, Avalon, Uniworld, and more) to match the boat to the journey. Tell me the river; I'll handle the rest.
